name: Feature request
about: Propose a new template, rule, example, adapter, or validation check
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

Describe the change.

## Use Case

Explain the agent or maintainer problem this solves.

## Suggested Shape

Describe where this should live, such as `skills/repo-memory/SKILL.md`, `skills/repo-memory/references/`,
`skills/repo-memory/agents/`, `skills/repo-memory/examples/`, or `skills/repo-memory/scripts/`.

## Compatibility

Note whether this changes the baseline docs structure or existing guidance.
